strings.KEYWORD_REDGUY_GRAB: <style=cKeywordName>Effectus Potentiatus</style><style=cSub>Potest capere duces. Trahit hostes per terram, inferens vulnus per tempus.
strings.KEYWORD_REDGUY_GRAB2: <style=cKeywordName>Duces</style><style=cSub>Contra duces, <style=cIsDamage>inhaere</style> eis potius et vade modum gobolini.
strings.KEYWORD_REDGUY_M12: <style=cKeywordName>Status Retentionis</style><style=cSub>Dum onerando saltum parietis, ingredere <style=cIsUtility>statum retentionis</style>. Dimitte ad agitandum usque ad <style=cIsDamage>5x vulnus</style> secundum celeritatem.
strings.KEYWORD_REDGUY_M2: <style=cKeywordName>Effectus Potentiatus (Terra)</style><style=cSub>Felices ictus <style=cIsUtility>longius saliunt</style> et <style=cIsDamage>augent vulnus 50%</style>, accumulando.
strings.KEYWORD_REDGUY_M2B: <style=cKeywordName>Effectus Potentiatus (Aer)</style><style=cSub>Infligit plus vulnus <style=cIsUtility>hostibus humilis valetudinis</style> et longius saliunt.
strings.KEYWORD_REDGUY_PUNCH: <style=cKeywordName>Effectus Potentiatus</style><style=cSub>Dissolvit crepidinem pugnum, inferens grave vulnus.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_BEAM_UNLOCKABLE_ACHIEVE: Ut Ravager, perfice stadium sine implendo Puteum Sanguinis.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_BLOODWELL_DESCRIPTION: Ravager condit <style=cIsHealth>sanguinem</style> ictibus suis, exinanit cum plena est ut sanet te <style=cIsHealing>75% valetudinis absentis</style> et <style=cIsDamage>potestates tuas</style> tempore roborat.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_BLOODWELL2_DESCRIPTION: Ravager condit <style=cIsHealth>sanguinem</style> ictibus suis, exinanit cum plena est ut sanet te <style=cIsHealing>100% maximam valetudinem</style> et <style=cIsDamage>potestates tuas</style> tempore roborat. <style=cIsHealth>Citius exinanit dum impugnat.</style>
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_DESCRIPTION:
Ravager est agilis propinquae pugnae percussor qui sanatur ex hostibus caesis ut in proelio maneant.<color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Onerandi saltus parietis est optimus modus tractandi volantes hostes.

< ! > Cleave est opportunus ad abrogandos magnae vulneris impetus sicut ad sustinendum vulnus emissum.

< ! > Coagulate potest esse utile in necessitate si non certus es Puteum Sanguinis implere posse, sed etiam passive uti potes ad manendum plenus.

< ! > Brutalize postulando sanat igitur cape et consume aliquid si deficis.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_GUYMAN_UNLOCKABLE_ACHIE: Ut Ravager, prospice in abyssum donec respiciat.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_LORE:
Ravager non natus est cum speciali potentia...

...potius, natus est cum Maledicta Sanguine Aspersa Katana sed quadam die ivit ad Stercorem Dimensionem et occurrit malae potentiae.....

Tandem egressus a Stercore Dimensione et has mirandas malas potentias tenens ipse venit in Petrichor V ad destruendum universum.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_MONSOONUNLOCKABLE_ACHIE: Ut Ravager, perfice ludum aut dele in Monsoon.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..et sic evanuit, eius ridicula violentia tandem finita.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, quaerens novas terras profanandas.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Ravager potest <style=cIsUtility>salire a parietibus</style> et <style=cIsHealth>hostibus</style>. Utere <style=cIsUtility>Primarium</style> dum oneratur ad ingrediendum <style=cIsDamage>statum retentionis</style>.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_PASSIVE2_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsHealth>10% HP</style>. Salta in aere ad onerandum <style=cIsUtility>blink antea</style>, semel per saltum. Adveniens <style=cIsDamage>ictus propinqui</style> hanc peritiam reficit.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_PASSIVE3_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsHealth>Constat 5% currentis valetudinis.</style> Salta in aere ad <style=cIsUtility>blink antee</style>, semel per saltum. Adveniens <style=cIsDamage>ictus propinqui</style> hanc peritiam reficit.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_PRIMARY_SLASH_DESCRIPTI: Agita antee pro <style=cIsDamage>230% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsHealth>Agitatur velocius quo inferior valetudo tua est.</style>
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_PRIMARY_SLASHCOMBO_DESC: Agita antee pro <style=cIsDamage>180% vulneris</style>. Quisque tertius ictus <style=cIsUtility>stupefacit</style> et infligit <style=cIsDamage>390% vulneris</style>.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_PUNCH_UNLOCKABLE_ACHIEV: Ut Ravager, percutite hostem ad terram 3+ vicibus in uno captu.
Ravager: In a Trail of Fire
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_PUNCH_UNLOCKABLE_UNLOCK: Ravager: In a Trail of Fire
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_SECONDARY_SPINSLASH_DES: Sali antee et perfice latum, <style=cIsUtility>stupefacientem</style> ictum pro <style=cIsDamage>500% vulneris</style>.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_SPECIAL_GRAB_DESCRIPTIO: Sali et <style=cIsUtility>cape</style> proximos hostes, tunc tunde deorsum pro <style=cIsDamage>1000% vulneris</style>. Si hoc occidit, <style=cIsHealth>consume</style> eos ad restaurandum <style=cIsHealing>10% maximam valetudinem</style>.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_SPECIAL_GRAB_SCEPTER_DE: Sali et <style=cIsUtility>cape</style> proximos hostes, tunc tunde deorsum pro <style=cIsDamage>1000% vulneris</style>. Si hoc occidit, <style=cIsHealth>consume</style> eos ad restaurandum <style=cIsHealing>10% maximam valetudinem</style>.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTRO: Maior radius ictus, et preme Saltus dum trahis ad blink sursum.</color>
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_SPECIAL_PUNCH_DESCRIPTI: Sali et <style=cIsUtility>punge</style>, inferens <style=cIsDamage>1000% vulneris</style> cum <style=cIsUtility>unda impulsa</style> per eos pro eodem vulnere. Si hoc occidit, <style=cIsHealth>consume</style> eos ad restaurandum <style=cIsHealing>10% maximam valetudinem</style>.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_SPECIAL_THROW_DESCRIPTI: Sali et <style=cIsUtility>cape</style> proximos hostes, tunc iacta eos pro <style=cIsDamage>1000% vulneris</style> in impactu. Si hoc occidit, <style=cIsHealth>consume</style> eos ad restaurandum <style=cIsHealing>10% maximam valetudinem</style>.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_SUIT_UNLOCKABLE_ACHIEVE: Ut Ravager, habe 15 socios vivos simul.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_THROW_UNLOCKABLE_ACHIEV: Ut Ravager, consume 8 aut plures hostes simul.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_TYPHOON_UNLOCKABLE_ACHI: Ut Ravager, perfice ludum aut dele in Typhoon aut Eclipse.\n<color=#8888>Quisque difficultas Typhoon aut superior computatur</color>
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_UNLOCKABLE_ACHIEVEMENT_: Applica 50 stackos Bleed in uno hoste.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_UTILITY_BEAM_DESCRIPTIO: <style=cIsHealth>Abrobe</style> invenientes <style=cIsUtility>projecta</style> ad onerandum vastum crepitum qui infligit usque ad <style=cIsDamage>5000% vulneris</style> cum plene oneratus.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_UTILITY_HEAL_DESCRIPTIO: Statim exinanite <style=cIsHealth>Puteum Sanguinis</style>, <style=cIsHealing>te sanando</style> cum sanguine consumpto.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_UTILITY_SNATCH_DESCRIPT: Emitte tuum <style=cIsDamage>bracchium imp</style> et cape remotum hostem in eius morsibus, <style=cIsUtility>trahens te ad quidquid percutit</style>.
strings.ROB_RAVAGER_BODY_WALLJUMP_UNLOCKABLE_ACH: Ut Ravager, salta parietem 20 vicibus sine tangendo terram.
